subject: U.S. celebrates Fourth of July, Trump-Kim DMZ meeting and Hong Kong protests
body:
Flipboard

## Biggest news stories from the past week.

---

<image>

### With Flyovers and Flags, Trump Plays M.C. for the Fourth
**nytimes.com / MICHAEL D. SHEAR** WASHINGTON – In a made-for-television Independence Day production starring America's military weaponry, President Trump on Thursday used the Lincoln... read more

---

<image>

### North Korea says U.S. 'hell-bent on hostile acts' despite wanting to talk
**reuters.com / by Michelle Nichols** UNITED NATIONS (Reuters) - North Korea's mission to the United Nations accused the United States on Wednesday of being “more and more hell-bent on... read more

---

<image>

### Trump Weighs Executive Order to Add Citizenship Question to Census
**bloomberg.com / Justin Sink, Andrew M Harris, Bob Van Voris** President Donald Trump said he may issue an executive order to add a question on citizenship to the 2020 census as the administration considers ... read more

---

<image>

### Trump warns Iran nuclear threats will 'come back to bite you'
**theguardian.com / Guardian staff and Agence France-Presse** Donald Trump has warned Iran to be "careful with threats" as they can "come back to bite you" in response to Tehran's vow that it will exceed within... read more

---

<image>

### Arrests made over Hong Kong protests, legislature break-in
**apnews.com / JOHNSON LAI** HONG KONG (AP) — Police said they had arrested 13 people after the protests on Monday's anniversary of Hong Kong's return to China, including one man... read more

---

<image>

### Acting DHS chief orders immediate investigation into offensive posts allegedly written by Border Patrol agents
**cnn.com / Priscilla Alvarez, CNN** (CNN) – Acting Department of Homeland Secretary Kevin McAleenan has ordered an immediate investigation into offensive posts "that allegedly includes... read more

---

<image>

### House Democrats sue for Trump's tax returns
**politico.com / BRIAN FALER** House Democrats on Tuesday sued for President Trump's tax returns, marking the beginning of a high-stakes legal fight over his efforts to keep his taxes... read more

---

<image>

### Cori 'Coco' Gauff, 15-year-old American, storms back for another Wimbledon upset
**usatoday.com / Scott Gleeson** The 15-year-old American pulled off another huge upset Friday, this one in a third-round thriller that saw her come back to beat Slovenian Polona Hercog... read more

---

<image>

### Alex Morgan and Alyssa Naeher lead U.S. women to 2-1 victory over England in World Cup semis
**nbcnews.com / David K. Li** The defending champs are now one victory away from hoisting the trophy for a fourth time. Alex Morgan celebrated her 30th birthday Tuesday by scoring a... read more

---

<image>

### European leaders back German Defense Minister Ursula von der Leyen to be first female European Commission president
**washingtonpost.com / Quentin Ariès, Michael Birnbaum** BRUSSELS — European leaders on Tuesday proposed awarding the powerful presidency of the European Commission to German Defense Minister Ursula von der... read more

---

<image>
